texto: This kid was writing saying that they were breaking down some of the racial lines in their towns and communities, because their break dance crews were mixed race, and they didn’t give a fuck. They didn’t care what the Klu Klux Klan said.”- Michael Holman (screenwriter, Basquiat)from nthWORD Issue #8, coming soon...
explicacao: Citação de Michael Holman sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “This kid was writing saying that they were breaking down some of the racial lines in their towns …” articula reflexao, break-dancing, hip-hop em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como hip-hop e klu-klux-klan.
